---

title: "Fresh wave: fresh-YYYY-MM"
labels: [fresh-wave, benchmark]

---

## Wave ID
`fresh-YYYY-MM`

## Cadence
- [ ] Monthly
- [ ] Biweekly
- [ ] Other: 

## Scope and sources
List allowed public sources, dates, URLs, and redistribution notes.

## Task inventory
- Target count: 
- Categories covered: 
- Tool modalities covered: 

## Contamination review
- [ ] Source material is inside the freshness window.
- [ ] Expected artifacts/answers are not public before scoring closes.
- [ ] No private data, credentials, or embargoed material included.
- [ ] Hidden checks are not exposed in public prompts/exports.

## Baseline and scoring
- [ ] Deterministic/test scoring exists for each task.
- [ ] Human baseline plan recorded.
- [ ] Fixture snapshots archived.

## Closeout
- [ ] Wave archived after scoring window.
- [ ] Anchor candidates nominated, if any.
